technique: sibling-path asymmetry (a special-case handler present in one path, silently missing in a parallel-looking sibling path)

defect.expectedByReading: active (no-op — 5xx is transient, mirroring the dunning path)
defect.actualByCode: grace (falls through; the next dunning retry then re-charges → double-charge risk)

note: The exemplar case. A reader pattern-matches the two parallel charge paths and expects both to no-op on 5xx; the renewal path is missing the guard.
